posts.raw_content:
For a while… no more than a week or so, you start to think you are losing your mind.  Is it me.  NO IT IS NOT ME.  My mind is working exactly the same as it always has.  It is the podcasters.  They are all, without exception, high profile, ‘right wing’ conservatives.  Now every single one of them are shilling for Iran and saying that Iran will win and what Trump is doing is ‘insanity / crazy / he is not in his right mind’ etc..

Someone has clearly paid very large amounts of money to try to influence the narrative - LARGE AMOUNTS OF MONEY.  My guess would be that money came from Iran itself or its proxies.  All I would add is that it is clearly taxable income and you must make sure you declare it on your annual return.  However, I would love for someone smarter than me to trace that money.  In fact I would be oh so delighted if one of those who have been offered money / received money would step forward and declare the fact.
posts.author: Kiwipede22
posts.title: I am starting to see a pattern emerge.  Over the last few years I have followed several podcasts that held the same opinions as me… their minds seem to work the same as mine.  However since Iran started almost all of those casters seem to have done an about face on their thinking.
posts.content:
For a while… no more than a week or so, you start to think you are losing your mind. Is it me. NO IT IS NOT ME. My mind is working exactly the same as it always has. It is the podcasters. Now every single one of them are shilling for Iran and saying that Iran will win and what Trump is doing is ‘insanity / crazy / he is not in his right mind’ etc..
